celestial_overhaul.configuration.arrowHi: When an arrow hits a non-player mob, it also makes a hit sound
celestial_overhaul.configuration.entityC:
Suffocation and Cramming damage scales with max health
newDamage = oldDamage * max(1, factor * maxHealth)
A value of -1 disables this function
 Default: 0.02
 Range: -1.0 ~ 1.0
celestial_overhaul.configuration.entityD:
Drowning damage scales with max health
newDamage = oldDamage * max(1, factor * maxHealth)
A value of -1 disables this function
 Default: 0.02
 Range: -1.0 ~ 1.0
celestial_overhaul.configuration.entityF:
Fall damage scales with max health
newDamage = oldDamage * max(1, factor * maxHealth)
A value of -1 disables this function
 Default: -1.0
 Range: -1.0 ~ 1.0
celestial_overhaul.configuration.fireTyp:
Fire type damage scales with max health
newDamage = oldDamage * max(1, factor * maxHealth)
A value of -1 disables this function
 Default: 0.02
 Range: -1.0 ~ 1.0
celestial_overhaul.configuration.frozenT:
Frozen type damage scales with max health
newDamage = oldDamage * max(1, factor * maxHealth)
A value of -1 disables this function
 Default: 0.02
 Range: -1.0 ~ 1.0
celestial_overhaul.configuration.fullFoo:
Natural healing scales with max health
newHealing = oldHealing * max(1, factor * maxHealth)
A value of -1 disables this function
 Default: 0.05
 Range: -1.0 ~ 1.0
celestial_overhaul.configuration.grassPi: Ignore the nearby grass when attacking
celestial_overhaul.configuration.hideEff: Hide the flame screen when it has the flame resistance effect
celestial_overhaul.configuration.maxHeal:
Entities are bound by this value when they healed
newHealing = maxHealth * factor
A value of -1 disables this function
 Default: -1.0
 Range: -1.0 ~ 1.7976931348623157E308
celestial_overhaul.configuration.playerH:
Starvation damage scales with max health
newDamage = oldDamage * max(1, factor * maxHealth)
A value of -1 disables this function
 Default: 0.02
 Range: -1.0 ~ 1.0
celestial_overhaul.configuration.poisonE:
Poison damage scales with current health
newDamage = oldDamage * max(1, factor * health)
A value of -1 disables this function
 Default: 0.05
 Range: -1.0 ~ 1.0
celestial_overhaul.configuration.protect:
Multiplicative stacking factor for Protection-like Enchantments
newDamage = incomingDamage * factor ^ totalPoints
A value of -1 disables this function
 Default: 0.96
 Range: -1.0 ~ 1.0
celestial_overhaul.configuration.regener:
Regeneration effect scales with max health
newHealing = oldHealing * max(1, factor * maxHealth)
A value of -1 disables this function
 Default: 0.05
 Range: -1.0 ~ 1.0
celestial_overhaul.configuration.resista:
Multiplicative stacking factor for Resistance Effect
newDamage = incomingDamage * factor ^ level
A value of -1 disables this function
 Default: 0.8
 Range: -1.0 ~ 10.0
celestial_overhaul.configuration.scaling: All damage scaling applies to player only
celestial_overhaul.configuration.strengt:
Strength effect damage bonus per level
A value of -1 disables this function
 Default: 0.3
 Range: -1.0 ~ 10.0
celestial_overhaul.configuration.title: Celestial Overhaul Configuration
celestial_overhaul.configuration.weaknes:
Weakness effect damage reduce per level
A value of -1 disables this function
 Default: -1.0
 Range: -1.0 ~ 10.0
